backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and email subscription features, with role-based access control enforcing admin and user permissions on each endpoint.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Footer attribution text was changed from 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' (with 'Athira S' in italics), referencing the affected file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-sentence summaries describing the purpose and notable details of each component or context file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens (colors, radii, chart colors, sidebar) for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in LanguageProvider and renders all page sections in order: Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About CGCT section rendering a timeline (2011, 2016, 2017, 2026), descriptive paragraphs, and a Chairman quote card, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section showcasing four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) in a responsive icon-card grid with staggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with a CTA banner, action buttons, social media links, newsletter subscription form, and an attribution bar that now reads 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' with 'Athira S' in italics.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-page hero section with animated countdown timer, count-up stat cards, logo row, and a scroll-to-survey CTA button, styled with a dark maroon gradient background and gold accents.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Decorative background component that renders a configurable number of rotated diamond/leaf shapes at fixed positions using absolute positioning.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language toggle button, dual logos, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section detailing the first HOPE Alumni Reunion event, including a poster image, event details card, purpose icons grid, and participant category cards with intersection-observer animations.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Section showcasing insights from February 2026 stakeholder meetings as an icon-card grid, plus a planning checklist, with fade-in animations on scroll.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Survey call-to-action section with links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys, a confidentiality badge, and a branded CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 visual card.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: React component that renders the Vision 2036 Strategic Pillars section with four animated cards (Quality, Restructuring, Sustainability, Education), using intersection observer for scroll-triggered animations and i18n translations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Defines a React context providing English and Malayalam translations via a `t()` function, along with a `toggleLanguage` function to switch between the two languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that computes and updates a live countdown to a fixed target date (12 April 2026, 9:00 AM IST), returning days, hours, minutes, seconds, and an expiry flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a numeric count from 0 to a target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set an `isVisible` flag once a referenced element enters the viewport, then disconnects the observer.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitSubscription` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitSubscription` method with an email address via React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the CGCT brand color system (maroon, gold, sage), and provides utility classes for animations, gradients, and component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including brand colors (maroon, gold, sage), typography fonts, animations, and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Alumni Reunion web app, tracking the current version (36), existing features, and a completed footer attribution text change to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S'.
